videos.title: Jund em Out With Artifacts
videos.description:
This isn't your typical Jund Em' Out deck but it does play with Biotech Specialist and Rottenmouth Viper!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-jund-em-out-with-artifacts
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7302952#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/5Xb2Y
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/FH5hv
